featureName: BUG-059-001: gkeepapi live-mode dependency missing from ML sidecar build surfaces

scopeProgress.name: Pin gkeepapi on the build surface + structural guard test

Stays In Progress (not Done): the bugfix-fastlane specialist-certification chain (regression/simplify/stabilize/security/audit) is owned downstream by separation of duties; this single delivery agent did not (and must not) self-certify those phases.

concerns.summary: Honest not-run Uncertainty Declaration (Gate G021): the broader LIVE ./smackerel.sh test e2e suite was NOT spun up. Deliberate: BUG-059-001 is a zero-runtime-delta build-manifest change (ml/app/keep_bridge.py untouched), and design.md designated a structural-unit guard + build-image-import as this bug's regression contract (an import test would couple execution to the dependency under question). Proportionate broader-regression evidence IS green: full Python unit (500 passed) + full Go unit (only pre-existing unrelated failures) + image build + in-image import. NON-BLOCKING for the structural deliverable; it keeps the packet at in_progress rather than a forced done. Evidence: report.md -> Regression Disposition + Evidence A/D/E.

executionHistory.summary: DEVOPS-059-A (stochastic-quality-sweep round 17/20): grep -rn gkeepapi ml/requirements.txt ml/pyproject.toml ml/Dockerfile exit 1 — live-mode dependency absent from all three build surfaces while ml/app/keep_bridge.py:72 imports it lazily. Orchestrator independently verified.

Set status blocked->in_progress (delivered, pending the bugfix-fastlane specialist-certification chain regression/simplify/stabilize/security/audit, owned downstream by separation of duties; NOT self-certified, anti-fabrication Gate G021).
